result.reasoning: The user asked for the Twitter handle of the reporter who wrote the March 20, 2012 Glendale News-Press story about Coppedge suing JPL, as per the version available on the LA Times website on June 8, 2023. The tool call history includes: step 1 constructed the Wayback Machine URL for June 8, 2023; step 2 used deepsearch and identified the reporter as Daniel Siegal with Twitter handle @ValleySunDan, citing an article dated March 21, 2012; step 3 deepsearched the specific article URL from March 20, 2012 and confirmed the article was authored by Daniel Siegal with Twitter handle @ValleySunDan. Although the June 8, 2023 snapshot was not explicitly fetched, the tool calls consistently provide the handle @ValleySunDan from the relevant article. Therefore, the answer is @ValleySunDan. Casing decision: The handle is provided with exact casing @ValleySunDan in the tool output, so authoritative casing is followed.
